string.CommonDescription: For individuals and teams getting started with Huly.
string.RareDescription: For individual creatives, freelancers, and micro-agencies.
string.EpicDescription: For professional creative companies and small businesses.
string.LegendaryDescription: Best for large multiple teams that need maximum capabilities.
string.SelectPlanToBegin: Select a plan below to get started
string.UpgradeDescription: You will be charged up to ${amount} immediately. The exact amount depends on your current billing period.
string.DowngradeDescription: You will receive a credit of up to ${amount} for the remaining subscription time. The downgrade takes effect immediately.
string.CancelDescription: Your subscription will remain active until the end of the billing period.
string.UncancelDescription: Your subscription will be reactivated and continue from the end of the current billing period.
string.LimitReached: Workspace limit reached, some functionality may be disabled. Upgrade to restore full access.
string.LimitExceededWarningHint: Your workspace is over the plan limits. Some features will be restricted starting {date} unless you upgrade.
string.LimitExceededRestrictedHint: Your workspace exceeds the plan limits. Upgrade your plan to restore full access.
string.UploadRestrictedToast: File upload is unavailable: workspace plan limit reached. Upgrade your plan to keep uploading new files.
string.RestrictedPlans: Only the workspace owner or billing manager can change the subscription plan
string.SubscriptionErrorMessage: Something went wrong. Please try again or contact support.
string.LargestFilesDescription: Files using the most space in this workspace. Delete files you no longer need to free up storage.
string.StorageOverLimit: Your workspace is over the plan storage limit. Delete files below or upgrade your plan to restore full access.
string.StorageUsageIncludesSystem: Total includes system files like avatars and previews that aren't shown below.
string.DeleteFilesDescription: This will free up {size} and detach the files from any place they're attached. This cannot be undone.
string.NoFilesYet: No files in this workspace yet.
string.StorageAccessDenied: Only workspace owners and maintainers can manage storage.
